description._content: You often don't see it in the pictures, but the photographer often struggles with the available light.
Images that have been viewed more than 100,000 times.
Alexa can play the violin. It's fun to watch her play and take pictures of her.
Alina is a delicate, slender beauty and an ambitious model.

Anastasia was hesitant to undress at first, but it was only a matter of time. Gradually, she became more and more confident. When she finally stood naked in front of the camera after an hour, she was really enjoying herself. She was able to show herself freely and expressively, and the resulting images are not subject to fashion trends.
Angie didn't like portraits; she wanted to be photographed nude. I did her the favor, for the most part.
Anna asked me if I could take her picture. A request I was happy to fulfill, of course.
Aurelia is one of those women whose nude body I can't get enough of.
Btissam at the very beginning of her modeling career.
Clara is one of the most delicate women I have ever met.
DearDaliah presents her naked body with the most beautiful smile I've ever seen.
I like models who can play an instrument. I can't resist them.
Gala has a baroque cello and can play it too. The shoot was a real treat for me.
Sometimes I switch positions and stand in front of the camera, sometimes I photograph myself with a remote shutter release. For me, this is an important experience for directing models.
Iveta is a beautiful, mature woman with a sense of humor.
Janina charms with her beautiful breasts and long legs.
Kim is for lovers of delicate bodies.
Kim-Alexandra is a beautiful woman with very sensual curves. Whether naked or dressed, she is hard to ignore.

Lina did some exciting shoots with me, in the studio, in the studio with oil (especially exciting because I was allowed to spread the oil), nude in public (in Dresden), or simply in nature. It was always a wonderful time with her.
Lola is a petite woman with many beautiful details. She’s someone you can look at for a long time without ever getting bored.
Madeleine is the queen of charming smiles.
I met Mandy near Bautzen, where we spent a few creative hours together.
Mina has every reason to feel confident showing herself to us. Her natural curves make for elegant, tasteful nude photography, and her portraits are just as captivating.
The most beautiful girls come from Saxony, here is the proof.
Nicole was one of my first models. Fortunately, she was patient with me. I photographed her twice, and I think you can see the difference.
The wonderful Pavla shows us her delicate body.
Peggy fell straight down to earth from somewhere in model heaven.
Polina is a young cellist who came to me with her instrument.
Radmila is a naturally beautiful woman, with the most charming little eye turn – and she looks stunning naked.

Working with Sarah was a real pleasure. She brings a natural grace and quiet presence to every frame. To help her feel comfortable, I began with a few portraits, knowing it was her first time posing nude. When she finally stood completely naked before the camera, there was a quiet honesty in her presence that made the images truly special. Sarah did wonderfully — even her gentle insecurity about her nakedness adds a tender, human quality to the photographs.
Zara had herself photographed in fine lingerie.
